final_acceptance_policy: Stage-local PASS proves synthetic/local Stage 3 boundaries only; production sender evidence, real Gmail/private-repository canaries, deployment and final review remain PARTIAL or NOT_RUN.

acceptance_contracts.title: 全标签消息级发现与只读 Filter Audit
acceptance_contracts.environment: injected synthetic Gmail transport; no Google call
acceptance_contracts.input: paginated synthetic messages distributed across All Mail, Inbox, Spam and Trash plus read-only Filter definitions
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Every page in each fixed scope is read as message ID metadata, logical IDs are deduplicated, filters are counted only, and no RAW request or mutation is made.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: synthetic scope difference 0; duplicate logical objects 0; Filter modifications 0; RAW requests 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable downstream RAW authorization and repair discovery pagination or scope logic.

acceptance_contracts.title: History 增量与确定性 Full Reconciliation
acceptance_contracts.environment: injected synthetic Gmail history/full-sync transport and Australia/Sydney clock
acceptance_contracts.input: normal and duplicate History pages, expired watermark, 404, page interruption, Sunday, difference and manual triggers
acceptance_contracts.oracle: A watermark advances only after every page succeeds; expired, 404, Sunday, difference and manual paths perform full reconciliation and converge to the synthetic truth set.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: candidate difference 0; premature watermark advances 0; duplicate logical objects 0; production scheduler assertions 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep M3 disabled, discard the incomplete watermark and require full reconciliation.

acceptance_contracts.title: 一手证据驱动的版本化 Verified Sender Registry
acceptance_contracts.environment: committed empty production descriptor plus synthetic active registry fixtures
acceptance_contracts.input: exact evidence-backed synthetic sender, wildcard, weak third-party, unknown sender and malformed registry controls
acceptance_contracts.oracle: The committed production registry has zero entries and cannot activate without protected evidence; only an exact canonical evidence-backed synthetic entry can verify.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: unproven production entries 0; wildcard rules 0; unknown RAW permits 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep the production registry empty and all candidates UNKNOWN.

acceptance_contracts.title: 独立双重分类验证
acceptance_contracts.environment: synthetic headers, authentication results and business fingerprints
acceptance_contracts.input: valid synthetic messages, spoofed display names, alignment failures, registry drift, conflicting authentication, outbound messages and 1,000 unrelated metadata records
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Pre-RAW and pre-M3 independently require exact sender, trusted authentication alignment and business fingerprint under the same registry/verifier versions; mismatch is fail-closed.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: unrelated RAW permits 0/1000; spoof acceptances 0; double-verification mismatch M3 authorizations 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Leave the source untouched, revoke RAW/M3 authorization and record only redacted review data.

acceptance_contracts.title: 许可后 Gmail RAW 字节保真
acceptance_contracts.environment: injected synthetic Gmail RAW response transport
acceptance_contracts.input: byte-exact multipart RFC message and invalid or ambiguous base64url controls
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Only a verifier-issued permit under the unchanged registry can request format=RAW; strict base64url decode preserves the exact source bytes and hash without MIME reconstruction.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: synthetic byte parity 100%; RAW before verification 0; ambiguous decode acceptances 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block persistence and M3, then repair permit binding or RAW decoding.

acceptance_contracts.title: 有界附件识别与隔离
acceptance_contracts.environment: in-memory synthetic MIME fixtures; no parser subprocess, model or network
acceptance_contracts.input: PDF, XLSX and CSV controls plus polyglot, corrupt ZIP, macro, formula, bomb, unsafe path, size and timeout abuse fixtures
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Magic bytes and bounded structural inspection classify supported objects while all suspicious or unsupported objects quarantine without execution, extraction or network access.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: supported synthetic recall 100%; malicious parse/execution/path escape/network calls 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Preserve encrypted Canonical Raw and disable processing for the affected attachment kind.

acceptance_contracts.title: 加密内容寻址与幂等 Append-only Raw Commit
acceptance_contracts.environment: official age CLI, in-memory append-only ciphertext store and pre-network GitHub guard
acceptance_contracts.input: same synthetic Canonical Raw repeated, duplicate attachment, partial write failure and plaintext GitHub PUT control
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Opaque IDs are keyed and stable, every persisted object is an age envelope, attachments deduplicate, existing objects are immutable, manifest commits last, partial failure resumes, and no success/recovery/M3 claim is emitted.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: persistent plaintext 0; overwrites 0; duplicate logical objects 0; private calls 0; false recovery or public success 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Stop the private write lane, retain any append-only ciphertext and resume only after object verification.
